words.def: a message whose ingenuity or verbal skill or incongruity has the power to evoke laughter
words.zh: n. 機智, 智力, 頭腦, 理智, 妙語, 機智的人

words.def: water frozen in the solid state
words.zh: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 賄賂

words.def: neckwear consisting of a long narrow piece of material worn (mostly by men) under a collar and tied in knot at the front
words.zh: n. 帶子, 線, 鞋帶, 領帶, 領結, 關係, 束縛, 平局, 不分勝負
n. 溼氣, 潮溼, 水分, 雨天
